heading: Authority to exempt pipeline carrier transportation
label: 15302 Authority to exempt pipeline carrier transportation
notes: Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided in , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1996Pub. L. 104–88section 2 of Pub. L. 104–88section 1301 of this title

children.text: is not necessary to carry out the transportation policy of section 15101; and
either (A) the transaction or service is of limited scope, or (B) the application, in whole or in part, of the provision is not needed to protect shippers from the abuse of market power.

children.heading: .—Initiation of Proceeding
children.label: b .—Initiation of Proceeding
children.text: The Board may, where appropriate, begin a proceeding under this section on its own initiative or an interested party.

children.heading: .—Period of Exemption
children.label: c .—Period of Exemption
children.text: The Board may specify the period of time during which an exemption granted under this section is effective.

children.heading: .—Revocation
children.label: d .—Revocation
children.text: The Board may revoke an exemption, to the extent it specifies, when it finds that application, in whole or in part, of a provision of this part to the person, class, or transportation is necessary to carry out the transportation policy of section 15101.
